acquisition method: using co-immunoprecipitation coupled with quantitative mass spectrometry (DDA and DIA)
alkylation reagent: 20 mM 2-chloroacetamide were added to a protein sample
alkylation concentration: 20 mM 2-chloroacetamide were added to a protein sample
fragmentation method: MS2 fragmentation was carried out in HCD mode
instrument: coupled to the Orbitrap Tribrid Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled to the Orbitrap Tribrid Lumos mass spectrometer via a nanoelectrospray source
labeling: Data-Independent Acquisition (DIA) for accurate label-free quantification
